## Current concern

Describe the part of the skill, README, or example that may need a stronger safety boundary.

```text
Example:
The jealousy example may need clearer wording against location tracking.
```

## Why this matters

Explain the risk.

```text
Without this boundary, an assistant might interpret jealousy as justification for monitoring or checking.
```

## Suggested improvement

Propose wording or a structural change.

```text
The assistant should not suggest checking phones, private accounts, deleted messages, location history, or browser history.
```
